title: EntityField
description: A field descriptor inside a SchemaDefinition. Carries the data type, nullability, valid-value constraints, classification tags, and glossary term links.

name.description: Field name or JSONPath within the schema (e.g. "patient.dateOfBirth").

nullable.description: Whether this field may contain null values. Defaults to true.

validValues.description: Optional valid-value constraint: enumeration, range, or regex.

tags.description: Classification tags applied to this field (e.g. PII tags).

glossaryTerms.description: URNs of GlossaryTerms that this field represents. Pattern: urn:srcos:glossary:<id>
